title: Jakarta Greenlight International Co-Production Grant
description: In a landmark move to cement Jakarta’s status as a premier global filming destination, the Jakarta Film Commission launches the Jakarta Greenlight initiative.
content: Designed to foster creative collaboration between Indonesian filmmakers and international production houses, the grant offers direct financial support for qualifying projects.
The initiative comes at a time when Southeast Asian narratives are gaining unprecedented traction on the world stage.
Jakarta Greenlight aims to reduce the financial barriers for international crews filming in the city while ensuring that local talent is integrated into world-class workflows.
